name: Maps
desc: Updates a map item's data (pixels, colors).

implementation.overview: S34 updates map item pixel data. Vanilla sends this for map items in hand. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S34.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S34PacketMaps)
modules.purpose: Server sends S34PacketMaps to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
